series_metadata.series_description: The Annual Reports provide information on BWC activities for the current fiscal year. The Annual Reports contain other published periodic reports about the financial outlook, accomplishments, goals, year end statistics, and the BWC customer service office locations and contact information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Upon publication, fulfill requirements of Ohio Revised Code. 149.11. these records , and ; Paper: Upon publication, fulfill requirements of Ohio Revised Code. 149.11. these records , and
